intent_gate.intent: Implement the checked-in AF-02 backend-neutral force-eject process-group contract.
intent_gate.uncertainty: None; current dev already transports non-Codex agent_pid values, and the exact internal field footprint is mapped.

completion_promise.promised_outcome: All backend process groups are killed on force-eject when recorded, with missing-pid retry behavior preserved.
completion_promise.stop_condition: Every GOAL.md criterion is checked and the commit gate passes, or the iteration cap records a concrete blocker.

regression_ledger: Resolved in iteration 6: 14 lifecycle/contract/dispatch tests exposed direct pid reads against legacy backend doubles without that attribute; the shared normalizer restored compatibility.
Resolved in iteration 7: boolean, zero, and negative pid/pgid inputs could reach ownership or kill boundaries; only positive non-boolean integers are now accepted.
Final exact verification: compatibility selector 14 passed; full suite 1312 passed, 2 skipped, 83.26% coverage.
next_action: Supergoal commit gate passed; await user acceptance before commit/merge.
